subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: What is the capital of Rajasthan and which are some famous places from this state?
question_hi:
राजस्थान की राजधानी और इस राज्य के कुछ उपन्यासी स्थानों: 

A. Mehrangarh Fort, Jodhpur
B. Amber Fort, Jaipur
C. Hawa Mahal, Jaipur
D. City Palace, Udaipur
E. Albert Hall Museum, Jaipur

इनके लिए उत्तराखंड
question_en: Which forts and palaces are famous in Rajasthan? Please select the correct option(s).
